personal.name: Name *
personal.summaryPlaceholder: Short summary of your qualifications and most important skills. Use - + space for bullet points.

jobDetails.targetJobTitleHelp: The job title that appears on your résumé
jobDetails.companyHelp: The company from the job posting (not editable)

skills.skillsPlaceholder: Separate skills with commas (e.g. TypeScript, React, Node.js)

experience.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your tasks, responsibilities, and achievements in this position. Use - + space for bullet points.

projects.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the project, your role, and the results achieved. Use - + space for bullet points.

education.descriptionPlaceholder: Additional details such as focus areas, relevant courses, or awards. Use - + space for bullet points.

ai.summaryPlaceholder: E.g.: Emphasize my project-management experience and leadership skills...
ai.summaryDescription: Describe how the summary should be adjusted (3-5 sentences).
ai.summaryWarning: The AI generates a new summary. You then need to save manually.
ai.experiencePlaceholder: e.g. Emphasize measurable results and team leadership
ai.projectPlaceholder: e.g. Emphasize the methods used and the business impact
ai.experienceDescription: The AI generates strong bullet points with action verbs and quantifiable results.
ai.projectDescription: The AI generates strong bullet points with focus areas and measurable outcomes.
ai.descriptionWarning: Enter instructions to generate the description.
